M-PROXY-BRIDGE.NAME: MTProto Integration
M-PROXY-BRIDGE.Purpose: Connect the portal-driven issuance flow to the underlying `mtproto_proxy` runtime and ensure issued-domain access hardening remains effective at the edge.

Scope.Item: Adapt to the upstream proxy engine interfaces
Manage policy updates for newly issued SNI domains
Align domain whitelist policy with per-SNI secret enforcement
Document forced user-link reissue after access-hardening rollout or later secret rotation
Preserve domain fronting behavior on port 443

Interfaces.Interface: Pushes or reloads routing policy for a generated SNI domain.
Defines web versus proxy handling on 443/tcp.

Risks.Risk: Upstream project internals may not expose a stable policy hook
Incorrect edge routing can break both HTTPS and proxy traffic
per-SNI secret misconfiguration can silently weaken or over-restrict intended issued-user access control
Missing rollout guidance can leave stale client links in circulation even when edge enforcement is correct
